6.1.title: Privacy Act 1988 — APP 8 Cross-border disclosure of personal information
6.1.snippet: APP 8 governs cross-border disclosure of personal information. An APP entity must ensure overseas recipient complies with APPs.

6.1.title: OAIC — Overseas data flows guidance
6.1.snippet: OAIC guidance on the cross-border disclosure provisions of the Privacy Act and APP 8 requirements.

6.1.title: Privacy Act 1988
6.1.timeframe: Since December 1988, last amended in October 2024

6.2.title: Privacy Act 1988 — APP 8 Cross-border disclosure of personal information
6.2.snippet: Full text of Australia's Privacy Act 1988. Contains the Australian Privacy Principles including APP 8 governing cross-border data disclosures. No explicit data localization requirement at federal level.

6.2.title: Privacy Act 1988
6.2.timeframe: Since December 1988, last amended in October 2024

6.3.title: Security of Critical Infrastructure Act 2018 — legislation.gov.au
6.3.snippet: Requires critical infrastructure sectors to maintain data and systems within Australia. Sets out obligations for critical infrastructure risk management programs including data storage and processing requirements.

6.3.snippet: Infrastructure requirements

6.4.title: Privacy Act 1988 — APP 8 Cross-border disclosure
6.4.snippet: APP 8 establishes conditional regime for cross-border data flows requiring equivalent protection before disclosure.

6.4.title: Privacy Act 1988
